inputs.label: Room Length
inputs.businessContext: Total length of the room in feet

inputs.label: Room Width
inputs.businessContext: Total width of the room in feet

inputs.label: Number of Doors
inputs.businessContext: Count of door openings where chair rail will not be installed

inputs.label: Standard Door Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of each door opening to be subtracted, in feet (typical interior door: 3 ft)

inputs.label: Number of Windows
inputs.businessContext: Count of window openings where chair rail will not be installed

inputs.label: Standard Window Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of each window opening to be subtracted, in feet (typical window: 4 ft)

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Additional material percentage to account for cutting waste and miter errors

inputs.label: Price per Linear Foot
inputs.businessContext: Cost of chair rail material per linear foot
